traces.task_description: TypeScript type error: Argument of type 'string | null' is not assignable to parameter of type 'string'
traces.root_cause: Missing null check before passing potentially null value to function requiring non-null string
traces.approach_summary: Added conditional check: if (value !== null) before passing to function. Used TypeScript optional chaining where appropriate.
traces.errors_encountered: TS2345: Argument of type 'string | null' is not assignable to parameter of type 'string'
traces.keywords: typescript type error null check strict null checks
traces.causal_intervention: Added conditional check: if (value !== null) before passing to function

traces.task_description: TypeScript module not found error for relative import path
traces.root_cause: Incorrect relative path — missing '../' level or incorrect file extension in import
traces.approach_summary: Fixed import path from './models/User' to '../models/User'. Also verified tsconfig paths and baseUrl configuration.
traces.errors_encountered: TS2307: Cannot find module '../models/User' or its corresponding type declarations
traces.keywords: typescript module not found import path relative import tsconfig
traces.causal_intervention: Fix import: import { X } from '../correct/path'

traces.task_description: TypeScript async function return type mismatch — Promise<User> vs User
traces.root_cause: Async function implicitly returned Promise but declared return type was raw object type
traces.approach_summary: Changed return type annotation from 'User' to 'Promise<User>' on all async functions. Also added explicit async keywords where missing.
traces.errors_encountered: TS2322: Type 'Promise<User>' is not assignable to type 'User'
traces.keywords: typescript async return type Promise mismatch
traces.causal_intervention: Make route async; use await with async DB/HTTP calls; don't mix sync/async

traces.task_description: TypeScript error: Property does not exist on type — accessing undefined object property
traces.root_cause: Object type not fully specified, TypeScript inferred 'any' and then caught missing property on actual usage
traces.approach_summary: Defined complete interface for the object. Used type assertion or widened the interface to include the missing property.
traces.errors_encountered: 2339: Property 'id' does not exist on type 'object'
traces.keywords: typescript property does not exist interface type definition
traces.causal_intervention: Define interface: interface MyType { field: string; }

traces.task_description: TypeScript strict mode error: Variable implicitly has type 'any'
traces.root_cause: Variable initialized without type annotation and TypeScript strict mode flagged implicit any
traces.approach_summary: Added explicit type annotation to variable declaration. Used unknown type where actual type was uncertain, then narrowed with type guards.
traces.errors_encountered: 7006: Parameter 'data' implicitly has an 'any' type
traces.keywords: typescript implicit any strict mode type annotation
traces.causal_intervention: Enable in tsconfig.json: { "compilerOptions": { "strict": true } }

traces.task_description: TypeScript enum value comparison failing — comparing enum member by string value
traces.root_cause: Using string comparison on numeric enum or reverse mapping not accounted for
traces.approach_summary: Changed comparison to use the actual enum member: Status.Active instead of 'Active'. Converted string comparisons to enum comparisons throughout.
traces.errors_encountered: TS2339: Enum value comparison type mismatch
traces.keywords: typescript enum comparison reverse mapping numeric enum
traces.causal_intervention: Use const enum for tree-shaking; or string literals instead

traces.task_description: TypeScript generic type inference failure with nested Promise chain
traces.root_cause: TypeScript unable to infer deeply nested generic types in chained async operations
traces.approach_summary: Added explicit type parameters to generic functions. Broke down the chain into intermediate variables with explicit types.
traces.errors_encountered: TS2533: Object is possibly 'null' / TS2769: No overload matches this call
traces.keywords: typescript generic type inference Promise nested explicit type
traces.causal_intervention: Add generic: function fn<T>(arg: T): T { return arg; }

traces.task_description: TypeScript error: 'this' context of void function — callback losing 'this' binding

traces.task_description: Docker build failing — apt-get install commands failing with 'Unable to locate package'
traces.root_cause: Missing 'apt-get update' before 'apt-get install' in Dockerfile
traces.approach_summary: Split into two RUN commands: 'RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y <pkg> --fix-missing'. On Ubuntu 24.04 use --fix-missing flag  mirror sync issues cause transient failures
traces.errors_encountered: E: Unable to locate package <package>
traces.keywords: docker apt-get update apt-get install package not found
traces.causal_intervention: Split into two RUN commands: 'RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y <pkg> --fix-missing'. On Ubuntu 24.04 use --fix-missing flag  mirror sync issue

traces.task_description: Docker container port not accessible from host — application not reachable
traces.root_cause: Application binding to localhost inside container but ports not mapped in docker run or Dockerfile EXPOSE
traces.approach_summary: Changed application to bind to '0.0.0.0' not '127.0.0.1'. Added -p flag to docker run: docker run -p 8080:8080. Added EXPOSE 8080 to Dockerfile.
traces.errors_encountered: curl: Failed to connect to localhost port 8080: Connection refused
traces.keywords: docker port mapping EXPOSE 0.0.0.0 bind address
traces.causal_intervention: EXPOSE <port>; docker run -p <host>:<container> ...

traces.task_description: Docker volume permission denied — container cannot write to mounted volume
traces.root_cause: UID mismatch between container user and host filesystem owner
traces.approach_summary: Added USER directive in Dockerfile to match host UID, or used chown in entrypoint script. Set PUID/PGID environment variables with entrypoint wrapper.
traces.errors_encountered: PermissionError: [Errno 13] Permission denied: '/data/file.txt'
traces.keywords: docker volume permission denied UID PUID PGID chown
traces.causal_intervention: Add 'USER <uid>:<gid>' in Dockerfile after setting up files

traces.task_description: Docker layer caching not working — apt-get update re-running on every build
traces.root_cause: apt-get update in different layer from apt-get install — any cache bust on update busts install too
traces.approach_summary: Combined apt-get update and install in single RUN command with proper cleanup: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y <pkg> && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
traces.errors_encountered: Docker rebuild taking too long because apt-get update re-runs
traces.keywords: docker layer caching apt-get update install combined layer
traces.causal_intervention: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y <package>

traces.task_description: Docker container exiting immediately after start — ENTRYPOINT vs CMD confusion
traces.root_cause: exec form vs shell form in CMD/ENTRYPOINT causing shell to not spawn the process correctly
traces.approach_summary: Used exec form JSON array: CMD ["node", "index.js"] instead of shell form: CMD node index.js. Ensured shell is not wrapping the process.
traces.errors_encountered: Container exits immediately after docker run
traces.keywords: docker CMD ENTRYPOINT exec form shell form exit
traces.causal_intervention: uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3; uses: docker/build-push-action@v5

traces.task_description: Docker multi-stage build not copying correct artifacts to final stage
traces.root_cause: COPY directive using wrong context path in multi-stage build
traces.approach_summary: Used --target to specify build stage. Ensured COPY used correct relative paths: COPY --from=builder /app/dist /app/dist. Verified artifact exists before COPY.
traces.errors_encountered: COPY failed: file not found in build context
traces.keywords: docker multi-stage build COPY --from target
traces.causal_intervention: FROM base AS builder; COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist

traces.task_description: Docker .dockerignore not working — .git folder still being included
traces.root_cause: .dockerignore file missing or incorrect syntax — need to be in build context root

traces.task_description: npm install failing with EACCES permission error — global packages directory not writable
traces.root_cause: npm trying to write to /usr/local/lib/node_modules but current user lacks permissions
traces.approach_summary: mkdir -p ~/.npm-global && npm config set prefix '~/.npm-global' && echo 'export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc
traces.errors_encountered: npm ERR! EACCES: permission denied, access '/usr/local/lib/node_modules'
traces.keywords: npm EACCES permission denied global node_modules nvm
traces.causal_intervention: mkdir -p ~/.npm-global && npm config set prefix '~/.npm-global' && echo 'export PATH=~/.npm-global/bin:$PATH' >> ~/.bashrc && source ~/.bashrc

traces.task_description: Node.js stream backpressure causing memory overflow on large file processing
traces.root_cause: Writing to writable stream faster than it can consume without respecting backpressure
traces.approach_summary: Used pipeline() or pipe() with backpressure handling. Processed streams in flowing mode. Used highWaterMark option to control buffer size.
traces.errors_encountered: FATAL ERROR: Reached heap limit — out of memory processing large file
traces.keywords: nodejs stream backpressure highWaterMark pipeline pipe
traces.causal_intervention: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node app.js

traces.task_description: Node.js process.env undefined in ES module context

traces.causal_intervention: require('dotenv').config(); // load .env before accessing process.env

traces.keywords: nodejs cluster module load balancing SCHED_RR round-robin
traces.causal_intervention: Use cluster.fork() in primary; workers handle requests independently

traces.approach_summary: Acquire locks in consistent order, use SELECT FOR UPDATE NOWAIT
traces.keywords: postgres deadlock detected concurrent update transaction lock
traces.causal_intervention: Order transactions by ID before locking

traces.task_description: could not connect to server Connection refused localhost 5432
traces.root_cause: PostgreSQL service not running
traces.approach_summary: Start PostgreSQL: sudo systemctl start postgresql
traces.keywords: postgres connection refused localhost 5432 connect server
traces.causal_intervention: sudo systemctl start postgresql

traces.task_description: max connections 100 exceeded all connections in use

traces.approach_summary: Add connection pooling with PgBouncer or increase max_connections

traces.causal_intervention: Implement PgBouncer connection pooling

traces.task_description: WRONGTYPE Operation against a key holding the wrong kind of value

traces.task_description: Connection refused 127.0.0.1 6379 redis

traces.task_description: OOM command not allowed when used memory maxmemory

traces.task_description: OOMKilled pod terminated out of memory

traces.task_description: The security token included in the request is expired AWS
